license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bnicmcaw
title: Top-down proteomics data analysis on the NRTDP TDPortal
author: Jeannie Camarillo

steps_raw.instruction: Top-down proteomics data was searched on the TD Portal (portal.nrtdp.northwestern.edu)
Raw files for analysis were selected for search using Top Down Search v. 4.0.

Search parameters: Organism: Homo Sapiens (Human) with Curated Histones: (Taxon 9606 - June 2020) Use Empirical P-Score: FALSE Filter by FDR: TRUE Create SAS Input Sheet for Quant: FALSE Precursor Resolution: High Resolution Fragmentation Type: Auto Code Set: Standard 4.0.0 Include ProSight Error Tolerant Search: FALSE
